records.description: Zoom meeting AI features in UCLA Zoom domain.

evidence.sourceTitle: Available AI Tools | Digital & Technology Solutions
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Zoom AI Companion features have been made available to all users in the UCLA Zoom domain. However, the default settings remain disabled for all users.

records.description: Web version of Microsoft Copilot recommended by TU Delft guidance.
records.howToObtain: Log into Copilot with TU Delft credentials.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Guidelines for Students - Faculty of Mechanical Engineering
evidence.evidenceSnippet: With data safety and uniformity in mind, the TU Delft recommends using the web-version of Microsoft Copilot at this moment in time. You can log into Copilot with your TU Delft credentials.

records.description: 由学校相关单位部署的本地 DeepSeek 模型服务，支持 DeepSeek、Qwen 等模型。
records.howToObtain: 按照上海交通大学相关平台入口使用。

evidence.sourceTitle: 如何高效获取信息 - HPC入门指南
evidence.evidenceSnippet: DeepSeek 本地版：由 Xflops超算队协助上海交通大学网络信息中心部署的本地 DeepSeek 模型，现已支持 DeepSeek、Qwen 等模型。
